overview.description: The iShares iBonds Dec 2026 Term Muni Bond ETF (IBMO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value weighted index of AMT-free municipal bonds that mature between January and December 2026. IBMO was launched on Apr 2, 2019 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: S&P AMT-Free Municipal Series Callable-Adjusted Dec 2026 Index
